# Pull Request

## What does this change?
<!-- 1-3 sentences. The reviewer should know the goal in 10 seconds. -->

## Why?
<!-- Link to issue, customer ticket, or strategic doc. -->

## How to test
<!--
- [ ] Step 1
- [ ] Step 2
- [ ] Verify nothing else broke
-->

## Screenshots / video
<!-- For UI changes only. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] No `.env` or secret committed
- [ ] No `console.log` left for debugging
- [ ] Mobile (375px) tested
- [ ] Empty states have product context
- [ ] Errors are user-friendly
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md if user-facing

## Risk level
- [ ] 🟢 Cosmetic (CSS, copy)
- [ ] 🟡 Standard (new feature, refactor)
- [ ] 🔴 Risky (DB migration, auth, payments)

## Deploy notes
<!-- Any extra steps after merge? Run `db:migrate`? Restart specific container? -->
